title: stelis ambrosia
intro: Stelis ambrosia, also known as the bee orchid or fragrant orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to tropical regions. The plant is prized for its fragrant, showy flowers and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis ambrosia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis ambrosia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
